title: After Russia Attacks Kyiv With Missiles and Drones, Historic Orthodox Cathedral Burns
summary_full: A bishop reported that many holy items had been recovered from the church, at the site of the Perchersk monastery, a revered place for the Ukrainian and Russian Orthodox faiths.
